text.title: pm-framework-focus-areas Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pm-framework-focus-areas as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using focus areas as a glorified table of contents without the seven Performance Domains as the orthogonal axis.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Focus areas answer "when" (lifecycle position); without domains answering "what area," the framework produces empty section headers with no substance.

failure-mode.description: Placing the same artifact in multiple focus areas because boundaries are fuzzy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Single-home tagging is required for analytics; double-counting inflates effort reporting and obscures where the team actually spends time.

failure-mode.description: Treating "40 non-prescriptive processes" as freedom to define 40 custom process names.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without org-level standardization, each PM invents their own subset and inter-team audits become impossible.
